_meta.description: R2A sonic fingerprint test: Tool (Progressive metal, difficulty: Hard). No artist name in caption. 3 seeds. Locked 2026-05-17.

captions.ace_step: Progressive metal, 132 BPM in shifting odd time signatures, downtuned distorted electric guitar with palm-muted polyrhythmic riffing, complex tom-heavy drumming with intricate cymbal work, fretless electric bass with audible string slides, baritone male lead vocal alternating between low spoken cadence and anguished melodic shouts, brooding philosophical introspective mood, dense atmospheric production with reverb and tape saturation

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Counting backwards from a number that I don't remember
Watching shadows learn the shape of my own face
Every prophet selling something I already paid for
Every god I built is asking for my name

[Chorus]
Tear it down
Build it again from the bones that bury us
Tear it down
Nothing sacred ever stays the way we wanted

[Verse]
Mirror tells the truth in a language I keep losing
Repetition is the only honest prayer
I confessed to every angel and they all said the same thing
You were never lost you only learned to disappear

[Bridge]
Strip it all back to the silence underneath
Strip it all back to the ringing in the deep

[Chorus]
Tear it down
Build it again from the bones that bury us
Tear it down
Nothing sacred ever stays the way we wanted
